epd_html_string:
gacchati vb. goes (acc)
dhamma nt. nature
header_EpdData:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
    <head>
        <meta charset="utf-8">
        <link href="dpd-css-and-fonts.css" rel="stylesheet">
        <title>Digital Pāḷi Dictionary</title>
        
<style>
:root {
  --primary: hsl(198, 100%, 50%);
  --primary-alt: hsl(205, 100%, 40%);
  --primary-text: hsl(205, 79%, 48%);
}

        </style>
    </head>
